provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Virtual Assets Act

provisions.title: Interpretation
Application of Act

definitions.definition: a property of any kind

a token that represents a claim against the issuer which—
( a ) is intended to represent an asset and is embedded with underlying assets
assigned to it under the Financial Intelligence Act (Cap. 08:07), and "beneficial interest" shall be construed accordingly
a virtual or digital distributed ledger or database of transactions relating to virtual assets which are recorded chronologically and capable of being audited
the Bank of Botswana established under the Bank of Botswana Act (Cap. 55:10)
a body outside Botswana which has functions similar to those of the Regulatory Authority with respect to the regulation and licensing of a virtual asset business
assigned to it under the Financial Intelligence Act
assigned to it under the Financial Intelligence Act

any event that results in unauthorised access to, misuse or disruption of the electronic systems or information stored on such systems of a virtual asset service provider leading to loss, unlawful destruction or unauthorised disclosure of or access to such systems or information
an online mechanism for the sale, trade or exchange of virtual assets offered by a virtual asset service provider to its customers
assigned to it under the Bank of Botswana Act
a person who is entitled to a significant interest in the issuer or organiser, and includes a beneficial owner if different from the issuer or organiser
an offer to the public, by an issuer, for the sale of a virtual token in exchange for fiat currency or another virtual asset
assigned to it under the Securities Act (Cap. 56:08)
an inspector appointed under section 6 and includes an investigator
a person contractually responsible for issuing a virtual token
a licence issued in terms of this Act
a person issued with a licence under section 11
a unique digital asset stored on a blockchain and serves as a verifiable proof of ownership for a specific item, artwork or collectible

a document, notice, circular, advertisement, prospectus or white paper issued to the public or otherwise publicly accessible—
( a ) inviting applications or offers to subscribe for or purchase virtual assets

a member of the board of directors, a chief executive, a chief financial officer, a senior executive, a manager, a partner, a money laundering reporting officer, a risk officer, a chief technical officer or any other person holding a similar function
a person who, if different from the issuer, whether alone or in conjunction with other persons, procures the issuance of virtual assets through an issuer on behalf of a customer
assigned to it under the Proceeds and Instruments of Crime Act (Cap. 08:03)
the Non-Bank Financial Institutions Regulatory Authority established under the Non-Bank Financial Institutions Regulatory Authority Act (Cap. 46:08)
assigned to it under the Securities Act (Cap. 56:08)
beneficial interests cumulatively representing more than 10 per cent of the issued and outstanding equity interests of the organiser, issuer or beneficial owner

any cryptographically secured digital representation of one or more rights provided on a digital distribution ledger platform or similar platform and issued by an issuer, and includes—
( a ) a virtual currency token

a trade or business that—
( a ) operates as an issuer of initial token offerings
the acceptance for safekeeping of virtual assets or instruments that enable a virtual asset service provider to exercise control over the virtual assets or instruments
a marketplace using the distributed ledger technology platform for the sale, trade, transfer or exchange of a virtual asset for fiat currency or another virtual asset
a service provided in relation to a virtual asset business or transaction

a person who—
( a ) under an agreement, as part of a business, undertakes a virtual asset service or any of the following activities for or on behalf of another person—
(i) the exchange between virtual assets and fiat currencies,
(ii) the exchange between one or more forms of virtual assets,
(iii) the transfer of virtual assets,
(iv) the safekeeping or administration of virtual assets or instruments enabling control over virtual assets, and
(v) the participation in and provision of financial services related to an issuer's offer or sale of a virtual asset

a digital representation of value which is digitally traded and functions as a—
( a ) medium of exchange
